message:
fix(normalize): reject mismatched quotes in unquoting logic

The quote stripping logic in normalize_command_word_token() and
normalize_subcommand_token() used strip_prefix/strip_suffix with either
quote character independently, which meant mismatched quotes like
"hello' would be incorrectly treated as a valid quoted string.

Now we explicitly check that opening and closing quotes match before
unquoting. Added test_mismatched_quotes_not_unquoted to verify.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
